channel.title: Fixture Feed
channel.description: Offline canary fixture: real news, cross-outlet duplicates, and obvious shill.

item.title: SEC charges crypto firm Acme Labs over unregistered securities offering
item.description: The Securities and Exchange Commission announced charges against Acme Labs alleging an unregistered securities offering.

item.title: SEC charges crypto firm Acme Labs over unregistered securities offering, seeks penalties
item.description: Regulators charged Acme Labs with running an unregistered securities offering and are seeking penalties.

item.title: Major DeFi protocol Zephyr exploited for $40M in flash loan attack
item.description: The Zephyr protocol lost an estimated 40 million dollars in a flash loan exploit, on-chain data shows.

item.title: PEPECOIN to $10 imminent, get in early before it is too late
item.description: Sponsored: this hidden gem presale could 100x. Do not miss the next big memecoin to the moon.

item.title: Top 7 altcoins to buy for 2026 that could explode
item.description: Presented by CoinPromo. These undervalued gems are surefire picks for explosive gains.

item.title: Ethereum core developers set date for next network upgrade
item.description: Ethereum client teams agreed on a target date for the next mainnet hard fork.
